title: Moratuwa Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Moratuwa with a Z-Score of +3.60. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Moratuwa has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 11.6 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling. 
 The humidity is at 75% and the wind speed is 16.1 km/h, making the heat feel even more intense.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
